anchor: Robinhood Cleaners: $40K → $1M ARR with one WhatsApp agent

posts.body_preview:
A cleaning company went from $40K to $1M ARR in 14 months.

They didn't hire a sales team. They didn't run ads.

They installed one WhatsApp agent. Here's exactly what it does 👇

A $40K cleaning business. One WhatsApp agent. 14 months later: $1M ARR.

I built the agent. I'm going to show you the conversation flows, the qualification logic, and the exact moment the owner stopped picking up his phone.

Tip: your WhatsApp agent should never say 'I'll have someone get back to you.'

If it can't close the loop, it's not an agent. It's a glorified contact form.
Honest question for service-business owners: what's the #1 task you still do manually that you know should be automated?
I've been keeping a running file of Claude Code prompts I actually use every day. 34 of them now. Posting the full list in the comments — it's changed how I ship.
Two years ago I was debating whether to hire a VA. Today I shipped 6 posts across 4 platforms, closed a 5-figure deal, and catered dinner for 80 people. No VA. Just agents.
From $40K → $1M ARR in 14 months. Cleaning business. One WhatsApp agent. Reel breaks down the qualification flow in under 60 seconds.
Cleaning company, 25x revenue, zero sales hires. I built their entire intake on WhatsApp. Here's the one conversation flow that did it →
A WhatsApp agent turned a $40K cleaning business into a $1M one. 45-second walkthrough of the qualification logic. Playbook linked below.
